topic.title: How to Import and Arrange Video Clips
topic.shortdesc: Learn how to add multiple clips to your project and organize them in the correct order.

section.title: Import Clips
section.p: 1. In the timeline, tap the "+" icon.
3. Choose your clips from your device and tap "Add."

section.title: Arrange Clips
section.p: 1. In the timeline, tap and hold a clip.
2. Drag it to a new position.
3. Release to place the clip in the new order.
